root.name: Add slide numbers to all slides except the title slide
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent has correctly added slide numbers to all slides except the title slide, without introducing extraneous changes.

children.name: Correct slides have slide numbers
children.description: All slides except the title slide have slide numbers added. The title slide must not have a slide number.

children.name: Non-title slides have slide numbers
children.description: Each non-title slide contains a visible slide number.

children.name: Title slide does NOT have a slide number
children.description: The title slide does not contain a visible slide number.

children.name: No extraneous changes made
children.description: No other changes (e.g., extra slides, transitions, animations, or layout modifications) were introduced beyond adding slide numbers.

children.name: No extraneous slides added or removed
children.description: No slides have been added or removed.

children.name: No extraneous transitions or animations added/removed/modified
children.description: No transitions or animations were added, removed, or modified.

children.name: No extraneous layout or element changes
children.description: No significant changes to slide layout, content, or elements other than adding slide numbers.

metadata.task: Add slide numbers to all slides except the title slide
